summary: Excellent SBD capture of a highlight‑filled show with a killer C.C. Rider jam and standout Mexicali Blues.
review: Both reviewers rave about the musical peaks of this concert – the “train sounds” in the C.C. Rider jam are called “so killer,” and Mexicali Blues is singled out as a first‑set highlight. The recording is an SBD (soundboard digital) source, praised for its clarity and lack of technical flaws, making it a must‑listen for deadheads who prefer pure board mixes.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong show quality with multiple song highlights and an excellent SBD recording, tempered by a moderate 3‑star review indicating mixed enthusiasm.

recording_quality.technical_notes: SBD source praised for crispness and clarity; no dropouts or balance issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is noted for several high points – a wild C.C. Rider jam and an energetic Mexicali Blues – suggesting a consistently engaging performance throughout.
